$schema: Inventory of mutating /api routes that do NOT call logChange. Each entry is either (a) a permanent volume exemption (chat/note/activity self-log) or (b) a TODO scheduled for a follow-up audit-coverage PR. Removing an entry is fine once the route either calls logChange or is deleted. Adding an entry requires a one-sentence reason that would survive code review.
app/api/projects/[id]/messages/route.ts: Chat-volume exempt — every project conversation message would drown the audit signal. Messages are immutable + visible in the project timeline anyway.
app/api/projects/[id]/messages/[messageI: Chat-volume exempt — paired with messages POST.
app/api/projects/[id]/notes/route.ts: Rep-note volume exempt — high-frequency UX, not commission-affecting.
app/api/projects/[id]/notes/[noteId]/rou: Rep-note volume exempt — paired with notes POST.
app/api/projects/[id]/activity/route.ts: Activity log IS the audit surface for project lifecycle events — auditing the audit-writer would be circular.
app/api/projects/route.ts: TODO PR 3a — new-deal create flow needs logChange; project mutations are ALREADY audited via /projects/[id]/route.ts on subsequent edits, but the initial create currently isn't logged.
TODO PR 3a — admin notes are admin-only and should be audited; deferring to keep PR 3 scope focused.
app/api/projects/[id]/admin-notes/[noteI: TODO PR 3a — paired with admin-notes POST.
app/api/reimbursements/[id]/receipt/rout: TODO PR 3a — receipt attach/remove; deferring (file metadata, not amount).
app/api/trainer-assignments/[id]/backfil: TODO PR 3a — trainer override backfill; touches historical commission.
app/api/prepaid-options/by-name/route.ts: TODO PR 3a — by-name lookup-and-mutate adapter; deferring to consolidate with /prepaid-options/[id].
app/api/import/projects/route.ts: TODO PR 3a — bulk Glide import; emits per-project audit lines is the right answer but would be 50k+ rows on a full import; design a batch-summary log entry instead.
app/api/import/users/route.ts: TODO PR 3a — bulk user import; same reasoning as import/projects.
app/api/admin/retention/route.ts: TODO PR 3a — retention policy job trigger; admin-only operational endpoint.
